notes: template row for a real execution; record the exact Pi session export path in session_path for every completed run so extract-pi-usage-from-row.mjs can verify the session id against ~/.pi/suggester/sessions/<session-id>/{meta,usage}.json and safely backfill input_tokens/output_tokens/cost; only leave session_path null for blocked/non-executed trace rows with an explanation in notes; for treatment runs also record the live surface check result: runtime-visible tools confirmed as pi_lsp_get_symbol, pi_lsp_find_definition, pi_lsp_find_references, and pi_lsp_rank_context, while /symbol, /refs, and /rank remain source-confirmed unless your session UI or logs expose a command registry dump
